title: Trainings
text:
I am a RStudio certified tidyverse instructor. I enjoy teaching data analysis skills using R. Here are some selected training/workshops/courses I have taught.






   
    
    
      Order By
      Default
      
        Training
      
      
        Delivered At
      
      
        Description
      
    
  
    
      
      
    






Training



Delivered At



Description








Elements of Machine Learning


Azim Premji University, Bhopal


An introductory course for undergraduate students to expose them to parametric and non-parametric machine learning methods.






Web Scraping with R


Azim Premji University, Bengaluru


An applied workshop for postgraduate students to extract data from static and dynamic websites.






Designing and Programming Survey Forms


Azim Premji University, Bengaluru


Applied training for undergraduate students to use SurveyCTO to design and program survey forms.






Data Visualization - A tour of favourite hits


Artha Global


A talk on good practices, taste, and common mistakes in data visualization.






Business Analytics


Gokhale Institute of Politics and Economics


A course for postgraduate students covering intro to programming, literate programming, data visualization, regression, and classification methods.






Advanced Analytics with R


Gokhale Institute of Politics and Economics


A course for undergraduate students to teach applications of regression, classification, resampling methods, regularization and multiple testing.






R for Data Analysis


Juspay


A course offered to employees at Juspay, ranging for engineers to product managers. The goal of the course was to train the participants in R programming for data analysis. The course covered fundamentals of R programming, writing functions, functional programming, literate programming, and RShiny framework.






Data Visualization


International Indian Statistical Association Conference 2022, IISc Bengaluru


A workshop on data visualization using the ideas of grammar of graphics via {ggplot2}.






Parameterized Reporting with R


RLadies Bengaluru


A talk on using quarto or Rmarkdown with {purrr} to generate parameterized reports.






No matching items

title: Hello!
text:
I am Ayush, an independent researcher interested in data, political economy, and development. My work spans experimental and non-experimental research, data analytics, and teaching data analysis skills. I am an adept R programmer with experience in developing web apps, reproducible workflows, and data pipelines.
I am affiliated with the Oxford Poverty and Human Development Initiative as a Researcher. For OPHI, I built, and now maintain the Global Multidimensional Poverty Index databank.
If you share similar interests and want to collaborate on a project, feel free to reach out. I am also available for training or consultancy needs in areas related to data analysis, policy, and development.
